hero.title: Approved international training. Practitioner-led.
hero.description: EIOSH International is an approved centre for IOSH, OSHAcademy, OSHAwards, HABC, OTHM and IEMA — delivering regulated qualifications and consulting across MENA, South Asia and beyond.

intro: We started with a simple belief: HSE training should be taught by people who actually do the work. Today, our faculty includes IRATA inspectors, IOSH-approved trainers, NEBOSH-registered tutors and ISO 45001 lead auditors — every one of them with site experience, not just slides.

pillars.title: Approved by 6 awarding bodies
pillars.description: IOSH, OSHAcademy, OSHAwards, HABC, OTHM and IEMA — externally verified centre standards on every cohort.

pillars.title: 12 years, 5,000+ certificates
pillars.description: Our public registry covers every learner we've certified. Verifiable by ID at /verify-certificate.

pillars.title: Cross-region delivery
pillars.description: In-person across MENA + South Asia, blended cohorts globally, plus dedicated corporate onboarding tracks.

mission: Equip every learner with credentials that actually open doors — and ensure that every certificate carries the same weight, whether issued in Lahore, Riyadh, Dubai or London.

cta.heading: Talk to our admissions team.
cta.description: Tell us your goal — qualification, corporate rollout, or compliance project — and we'll match you to the right pathway.
